prestazioni: 3.5L EcoBoost V6 (3rd Gen, engine code: *MCE*) twin-turbo upgrade to BorgWarner EFR 9180 turbos with billet compressor wheels, 64mm inducer, and 3.5" V-band inlet/outlet, paired with a custom PTP titanium turbo manifold and 4" downpipe with Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converters for 650whp on E85 with a Motec M150 ECU managing direct port methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit) and ID1000X injectors

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Ford Performance 4.10:1 rear differential gears with ARP studs, upgraded axles from Strange Engineering (S-Series 35-spline), and a Centerforce DYAD twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for the 10R80 10-speed transmission, controlled via a Paddle-Shift Solutions full sequential conversion with paddle shifters and launch control

Suspension overhaul: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with remote reservoirs, 800lb/in front springs, and 600lb/in rear springs, paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (27mm front, 24mm rear) and polyurethane bushings, alongside a custom Air Lift Performance 3P management system for on-the-fly ride height adjustment with AccuAir ENDO VT management and Viair 480C compressors
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (Expedition-specific, not generic) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, featuring integrated LED turn signals and a 3D-printed ABS rear spoiler with Gurney flap for downforce

Custom 22" Forgeline GA3R wheels in a staggered fitment (22x10.5" front, 22x12.5" rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30 front, 325/25 rear), wrapped in a matte military green vinyl with a satin black roof and custom Stealth badging (laser-etched aluminum, 3M reflective finish)

Interior overhaul: Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point Schroth harnesses, a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8-point bolt-in) wrapped in Alcantara with red stitching, and a full digital dash conversion using a Racepak IQ3 logger with OBD-II integration, paired with a Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel and custom aluminum pedal covers (machined from 6061-T6)
